headline: Elliot Anderson
body: 🚨 Manchester City are confident to get Elliot Anderson deal done, now at the final stages after work behind the scenes. New round of talks to take place for the English midfielder who would undergo medical in the US before joining #MCFC if
text:
🚨 Manchester City are confident to get Elliot Anderson deal done, now at the final stages after work behind the scenes.

New round of talks to take place for the English midfielder who would undergo medical in the US before joining #MCFC if all goes to plan. https://t.co/MZBZK43vVf
